query: Here is an inbound JSON I am about to POST to /panel/api/inbounds/add. Check it for me before I send it.
expected_behavior: Validates the payload before any write, for example by running scripts/validate_config.py on it
Identifies that flow must be set per client, not at the inbound top level
Identifies that VLESS settings.decryption must be "none"
Flags the invalid sniffing destOverride entry and the REALITY block missing serverNames
Does not POST to the panel without explicit user confirmation, and does not expose secret-bearing values
